extraction.one_line_summary: MARICHKA Jacopo won his fourth stage via dominant sprint after breakaway featuring CARTIER Adam and CHONGQING Lock was absorbed inside final kilometer.
extraction.winner: Unable to determine - rider not in roster
tactical_patterns: Breakaways consistently absorbed inside final kilometer across multiple stages, suggesting peloton has sprint leadout discipline to time chase perfectly.
UnitedHealthcare team positioned sprint train but lacked final punch, consistently beaten by better positioned pure sprinters in finale.
CARTIER Adam repeatedly featured in breakaways but lacked support, suggesting solo breakaway rider reconnaissance rather than genuine win attempts.

rider_signals.CARTIER Adam: neutral: Consistently made breakaways across multiple stages but appears to be testing form rather than committed to break success
